name: Bianco Mangiare
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cake into 1/2-inch slices.
2. Place one layer in the bottom of a 9-inch cake pan. Set aside.
3. In a saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch. Cook over medium heat, gradually adding milk while stirring until the mixture boils and thickens.
4. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract and cinnamon.
5. Pour half the pudding over the sliced cake. Scatter chocolate and pecans over this layer.
6. Add another layer of cake, then pour the remaining pudding and scatter the remaining chocolate and pecans.
7. Top with chopped cherries.
8. Refrigerate until serving.
9. Serve cold on chilled plates with chocolate sauce, if desired.
